title: Veltria Firmographics Sample
subtitle: 25-row preview with revenue bands for US and Europe private company data
description: Public preview of Veltria company-level firmographics. Includes 25 sample rows, visible revenue_usd and revenue_band columns, schema, and field guide. Full dataset scope: 756,757 private companies; 394,182 Europe; 362,575 United States; focused on estimated $5M-$300M annual revenue. Company-level data only: no personal emails, no personal phone numbers, no individual contact records. Use cases: private equity deal sourcing, search fund target lists, market mapping, TAM sizing, GTM segmentation and CRM account enrichment. Full access: https://data.veltria.in

resources.description: 25 public preview rows with visible revenue_usd and revenue_band columns.

fields.name: country
fields.description: ISO-style country code, e.g. US, DE, GB.

fields.name: current_owners
fields.description: Semicolon-separated current owner names where available.

fields.name: revenue_usd
fields.description: Estimated annual revenue in USD, placed near the front of the public sample so marketplaces display the revenue field clearly.

fields.name: revenue_band
fields.description: Readable estimated annual revenue band derived from revenue_usd.

fields.name: revenue_is_estimated
fields.description: Whether the revenue figure is an estimate.

resources.description: Field names, Snowflake-style types and descriptions.
Dataset card explaining scope, revenue fields and usage.

userSpecifiedSources: Veltria public sample and schema. Full source dataset is Veltria company-level firmographic database; commercial access at https://data.veltria.in. Public sample contains no personal emails, no personal phone numbers, and no individual contact records.
